Notice Of Hearing On On Request For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-10-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Osterhout Group, Inc., a Delaware corporation, dba Osterhout Design Group.
Dept. 514. Judge: Samuel K. Feng. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Nichole Rodich, CSR #11604. Telephone: 415-551-5869. Email: nrodich@sftc.org.

Kelly B. Bosche, Esq. appeared via CourtCall for plaintiff SVF Townsend San Francisco Corporation.
Nancy Anderson, General Manager at Cushman & Wakefield, was placed under oath and testified.
Ms. Anderson appeared via CourtCall for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Osterhout Group, Inc., a Delaware corporation, dba Osterhout Design Group.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Lease for Commercial Real Property was filed on Jule 17, 2019 and personally served on defendant Osterhout Group, Inc., a Delaware corporation, dba Osterhout Design Group's Authorized Agent of Process on June 24, 2019.
Default as to defendant Osterhout Group, Inc., a Delaware corporation, dba Osterhout Design Group, was entered on July 29, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 25, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff SVF Townsend San Francisco Corporation, and against the defaulted defendant Osterhout Group, Inc., a Delaware corporation, dba Osterhout Design Group, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $3,671,711.51.*
Prejudgment Interest - $101,011.95.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $595.00.

Total - $5,815,115.76.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

*In accordance with Judge Feng's ruling, the Mitigation Credit of $2,038,972.30 is removed, thus making the total Damages/Principal award in the amount of $5,710,683.51, for a total Judgment of $5,815,115.76.
